visual_intent: mist-blue calm with very restrained apricot warmth
brand_guardrails: preserve top 15 percent and bottom 25 percent as safe zones for Instagram story UI
avoid crowded multi-panel or collage layouts
maintain visual continuity with the related feed carousel
no product photography in this story frame
follow the latest Steel Light brand visual direction
match mood and restraint from the selected references without copying exact frame layout, crop, or focal placement
composition: subtle background texture or single abstract focal element
text-first story sequence with frame 1 headline, frame 2 support, and frame 3 CTA
cloud-white or mist-blue background with soft steel-blue structure and restrained apricot cues
reference_strategy: Use the editorial-whitespace anchor for breathing room and the cool-palette anchor for steel-blue atmosphere.
variation_guardrails: avoid copying the reference frame structure too closely

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif
slides_ja: 細胞のエネルギーづくりを支える大切な存在です。
保存して、あとでゆっくり見返してください。

negative_prompts: exact duplication of any reference crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 23 story reinforcement. Keep the Steel Light mood and vertical breathing room consistent while varying exact frame layout and focal placement.
